channel.title: Parse-Dont-Validate on cekrem.github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Parse-Dont-Validate on cekrem.github.io

item.title: Canonicalise, Don't Remember — Smart Constructors in Kotlin
item.description: Quick disclaimer up front: the bug below is real, the domain and the details aren’t. I swapped the original (a private codebase I can’t paste from) for a shopping cart, because the shape of the lesson is identical and a cart is a kinder example to read. So when I say “I went to look at the diff” further down, that part’s real. The cart is a stand-in. Indulge me.
